message:
fix(control-plane): resolve mutable borrow conflict in advance_tick starvation detection

The advance_tick method had a mutable borrow scope issue where
self.counters was mutably borrowed for the entire loop iteration, but
self.record_audit() also needed &mut self further down. Rust's borrow
checker (E0499) rejected this.

Fix: extract the starvation detection logic into a scoped block that
borrows self.counters mutably, computes the starvation tick count, and
drops the borrow before record_audit is called. The starvation_ticks
value is passed out via Option<u64> to determine whether an audit
record should be emitted.

This is part of the bd-27du.9 bounded-capacity audit log work for
ControlLaneScheduler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
